title: The Price of Knowledge
description: The witch smiles as she closes her ancient tome. "Knowledge is never free," she whispers. "Now... what will you offer in return?"

options.title: Offer Your Gold
options.description: Knowledge is valuable, but your soul is not for sale.

options.title: Swear Your Loyalty
options.description: You promise to serve the witch whenever she calls.

options.title: Refuse to Pay
options.description: "Knowledge should be free," you say. The witch's smile slowly fades.
